title: pavonia coccinea
intro: Pavonia coccinea, also known as Rose Mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its root and leaves. The health benefits of Pavonia coccinea include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
